subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of the Unseen hath spoken forth from the Kingdom of Mine inviolable sanctity: "Verily, there is no God but Me, the All-Compelling, the Lord of all worlds." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان غیبی فی جبروت عصمتی انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن علی العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @belief and denial, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
